patch.value: GH-645: standard-depth get/show JSON omits notes without notes_count
At the default standard depth, pm get/show --json suppresses notes but exposes no notes_count or omission metadata, so agents can falsely conclude the item has no working context.

Default standard-depth get/show JSON reports notes_count whenever notes are omitted; full/deep projections remain backward compatible and include notes; CLI aliases, SDK result contracts, MCP projections, TOON/JSON docs, and contract fixtures remain coherent; regression tests cover zero, one, and multiple notes plus explicit depth modes
Standard-depth structured output makes omitted note context explicit through notes_count and depth/projection metadata, or includes the notes consistently.
Default standard-depth JSON omits notes and exposes neither notes_count nor a signal that note context was projected out.

value.author: codex-sdk-boundary-20260722
